simple_types.name: Ellipse_Geometric_Parameter_Index
simple_types.code:
type Ellipse_Geometric_Parameter_Index is
  (Center_X,
   Center_Y,
   Tilt_Angle,
   Semi_Major_Axis,
   Semi_Minor_Axis);

simple_types.name: Ellipsoid_Geometric_Parameter_Index
simple_types.code:
type Ellipsoid_Geometric_Parameter_Index is
  (Center_X,
   Center_Y,
   Center_Z,
   Roll,
   Pitch,
   Yaw,
   Semi_Major_Axis,
   Semi_Middle_Axis,
   Semi_Minor_Axis);

simple_types.name: Sphere_Geometric_Parameter_Index
simple_types.code:
type Sphere_Geometric_Parameter_Index is
  (Center_X,
   Center_Y,
   Center_Z,
   Radius);

subtypes.name: Ellipse_Parameter_Index
subtypes.code:
subtype Ellipse_Parameter_Index is Ellipse_Geometric_Parameter_Index range
  Semi_Major_Axis .. Semi_Minor_Axis;

subtypes.name: Ellipsoid_Parameter_Index
